creator: cross+freebsd@distal.com
text:
Similar to bug #189497, an incompatibility based on a change in twisted.web.client is needed to deluge.  It has apparently been committed to deluge 1.3-stable, and will be in 1.3.12.

It looks like 1.3.12 isn't out yet, but pre-applying this patch to the FreeBSD port would be helpful to me at the moment.

http://dev.deluge-torrent.org/changeset/d40dfcd53c243

Thanks.
